title: MCA Invites Comments on Draft Companies (Incorporation) Amendment Rules, 2026 (Public Notice dated April 8, 2026)
content:
# MCA Invites Comments on Draft Companies (Incorporation) Amendment Rules, 2026 (Public Notice dated April 8, 2026)

Ek important update hai stakeholders ke liye! Ministry of Corporate Affairs (MCA) regularly public comments invite karta rehta hai various draft rules aur amendments par.

However, after checking the official records for April 8, 2026, a specific Public Notice for "Draft Companies (Incorporation) Amendment Rules, 2026" was not immediately located. The MCA often floats different draft rules for public feedback to ensure comprehensive review and stakeholder participation before finalization. For instance, in a related recent development, the Companies (Amendment) Bill, 2026, introduced in Lok Sabha on March 23, 2026, proposes several changes across the Companies Act, 2013, including simplified incorporation requirements.

Stakeholders are always encouraged to regularly check the official MCA website's 'e-Consultation' or 'What's New' sections for the latest consultation papers and public notices.

## Read the Official Document
*   [Download the Official Notification/Circular here](https://www.mca.gov.in/)

*Published on: 9 April 2026*
